name: Jade and Gold Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 large carrot, peeled and sliced diagonally
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oils in a large skillet or stir-fry pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sherry.
3. Add broccoli, carrot, and gingerroot. Stir-fry until the broccoli is crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.
4. Add the baby corn. Stir-fry until heated through, about 1 minute.
5. Discard the ginger slices.
6. Season with salt to taste.
7. Serve. Makes 6 servings.
